Contractors are required to disclose 7 years of history as permitted by state law. If the disposition date or prison release date of a case falls within the previous 7 years of history,the case will be used in adjudication. If  probation or parole concludes within the previous 7 years,the case will be used to adjudicate as permitted by state law. Probation will not be used to extend the scope in CA,KS,MA

column1: Acquitted - A judge or jury finds that the evidence proves that the defendant did not commit the crime.
Not Guilty - A judge or jury finds that the evidence does not provide beyond a reasonable doubt that the defendant committed the offense.
Nol Pros or Nolle Prosse(d)- The state�s attorney declares that he or she will not prosecute a case or some charge on a case any further.
Withdrawn - The state's attorney or judge withdraws charges against a defendant.

Accelerated Rehabilitation Disposition Program (ARD) - (PA) Postponing a judgment based on the defendant completing court assignments for rehabilitation.  First offender program; If program fees & fines are completed,case/charge MAY be dismissed.

Adjournment in Contemplation of Dismissal (ACD) - offered with the expectation that the case will be dismissed once the probation period is over,provided the defendant commits no further offenses of any kind.
Adjudication Withheld or Judgment Withheld - a withholding of judgment for a predetermined amount of time with requirements assessed against the defendant by the court.
